publishedAbstract: The `odf-operator-controller-manager` pod is in a constant `CrashloopBackoff` state The `manager` container is getting `OOMkilled` in the `odf-operator-controller-manager` pod.
publishedTitle: The odf-operator-controller-manager pod  keeps crashlooping after upgrading from ODF 4.9.7 to 4.9.8
